title: pentameris calcicola
intro: Pentameris calcicola, also known as the lime grass or calcicole grass, is a type of plant species in the grass family Poaceae. It is primarily found in the alpine meadows and mountainous regions of Eastern Europe, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against infections. The health benefits of Pentameris calcicola include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Pentameris calcicola can be made by infusing the dried plant material in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of a decoction or tincture to reap its medicinal benefits.
